auditor: Fort Group Chartered Professional Accountants Inc.
economic_notes: Operates Tim Hortons franchise through 2361701 Ontario Inc. and Waaninaawagaang Developments LP. Has forestry operations through Obishikokaang Resources Corporation. Has hydroelectric interest through Lac Seul Ear Falls GP Ltd. (owns 0.01% of Lac Seul Generating Station Limited Partnership). Flood claim settlement fund established with Government of Canada compensation.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to deferral of program surplus revenues that under Canadian public sector accounting standards should be recognized in the year. Had the revenue not been deferred, total revenue would increase by $24,775,920, annual surplus would increase by $24,775,920, and net financial assets would increase by $24,775,920. Consolidated entity includes 14+ subsidiaries including Flood Claim Settlement, housing authorities, Tim Hortons franchise, forestry corporation, and trust. Deferred revenue balance of $26.4M is very large relative to operations. Lac Seul First Nations Trust holds $21.1M in restricted investments related to Flood Claim Settlement from Government of Canada.
